title: Dashboard default state Edit/View

posts.author: BoyanIliev (Boyan Iliev)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’m new to Monday and seem to be stuck at using dashboards. The dashboard is set up and ready to be used, yet every time I open it, it opens by default in “Edit” mode. How can I switch this and open the dashboard by default in the “View” mode?

Thank you,
Boyan

posts.author: jk193 (Jake K)
posts.cookedHtml: +1 here. I think it’s the default for some reason or maybe a bug.

posts.author: safddsafsfsfsfsadfsf (KP)
posts.cookedHtml: Samesies. Feels like Monday is full of these really minor bugs that cost a lot of time to the user but probably take an hour to fix.

posts.author: Bfly85 (Brianna Flynn)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree. I am finding this problem and it is really annoying.

posts.author: paulmatsushima (Paul Matsushima)
posts.cookedHtml: Totally agree. Monday has a ton of little minor bugs that cause a ton of headache and friction to us end users. Makes using the platform really annoying over time. Monday seems to prioritize releasing new features while neglecting minor bugs and things that, if fixed, would really show care for us long-time users.
